metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Media Design 10 teaches students to create compelling visual and multimedia content using design principles and digital tools. Students learn graphic design, photography, video production, and animation while developing critical analysis skills about media messages. They explore how to communicate effectively through visual media while considering ethical, cultural, and social dimensions of media creation.
metadata.general_description: Elective course focused on graphic design, photography, video, and multimedia creation.

big_ideas.statement: Design principles—balance, contrast, emphasis, and alignment—guide the creation of effective visual communication.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students learn that thoughtful application of design principles makes media more engaging and easier to understand. Good design is purposeful, not decorative.

big_ideas.statement: Visual media is a powerful tool for communication, storytelling, and persuasion that shapes how people think and feel.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students explore how media creators make choices about imagery, color, composition, and narrative to influence audiences. They develop critical awareness of media messages.

big_ideas.statement: Digital tools enable creative expression, but the designer's vision and skill determine the quality of the final product.
big_ideas.elaboration: Technology is a means to an end. Students learn to use tools skillfully while keeping design goals and user needs at the center of their work.

big_ideas.statement: Ethical media creation requires considering representation, authenticity, cultural context, and the impact of images on diverse audiences.
big_ideas.elaboration: Students develop awareness of how media can perpetuate stereotypes, misrepresent communities, or cause harm. They learn to create media that is respectful, accurate, and inclusive.

competencies.raw: Apply design principles to visual communication
i_can_statements: I can analyze and apply design principles (balance, contrast, emphasis, unity)
I can use color theory and typography effectively
I can create layouts that guide viewer attention
I can evaluate designs for effectiveness and impact

competencies.raw: Design visual solutions for communication problems
i_can_statements: I can analyze what a design needs to communicate
I can create designs that meet specific goals and audiences
I can develop visual identity and branding
I can adapt designs for different media and formats

competencies.raw: Create compelling visual narratives through photography and video
i_can_statements: I can compose photographs using visual principles
I can use framing, lighting, and perspective deliberately
I can create video narratives that tell stories
I can use sequencing and editing to guide meaning
I can create media that represents diverse people respectfully
I can identify and challenge bias in visual media
I can acknowledge sources and respect copyright
I can consider impact of my designs on various audiences
I can use graphic design software to create layouts and graphics
I can work with layers, masks, and effects
I can manipulate and edit images
I can export and prepare files for different uses

competencies.raw: Capture and edit photography and video
i_can_statements: I can operate cameras and understand exposure, focus, and composition
I can edit photographs for quality and impact
I can shoot and edit video footage
I can use audio effectively in multimedia projects
I can create animations and motion graphics
I can use timing and keyframes to create compelling motion
I can combine animation with other media elements
I can create visual effects

competencies.raw: Manage media projects from concept to completion
i_can_statements: I can plan media projects with storyboards and concepts
I can organize and manage media assets
I can produce final deliverables
I can present work professionally

competencies.raw: Understand digital image and media formats
i_can_statements: I can understand image formats, resolution, and color modes
I can optimize images for different uses
I can understand video formats and codecs
I can work with audio formats and quality

competencies.raw: Use web and interactive media tools
i_can_statements: I can create designs for web and mobile
I can understand responsive design principles
I can use interactive design tools
I can export for web and digital platforms
I can organize and manage digital files
I can batch process and automate tasks
I can work with cloud-based collaboration tools
I can understand file compression and optimization
I can explore augmented and virtual reality
I can understand 3D graphics and modeling basics
I can work with immersive media formats
I can adapt to new tools and emerging technologies

areas.name: Design Principles and Visual Communication
topics: Design for different audiences and contexts

areas.name: Graphics, Animation, and Advanced Media
topics: Graphic design for print and web
